title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, multi-model, RAG, admin panel).

title: oll4ma
summary: Lightweight Rust CLI wrapper around Ollama with coloured diffs and prompt templates.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Go-based interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, supports history and roles.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal PyQt6 desktop GUI to chat with Ollama models locally.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that uses Ollama models for inline code suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Simple retrieval-augmented-generation pipeline using Ollama embeddings + Chroma.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions via Ollama models.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot adapter for Ollama; mention the bot to chat or summarise threads.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client library for Ollama with async support and native jsony marshalling.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed models and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around Ollama HTTP API using Finch for fast pooled requests.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem to chat and embed with Ollama; includes Rails ActiveModel integration.

title: ollama-php
summary: Community PHP client for Ollama with PSR-18 HTTP abstraction and Laravel package.
